message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam sequenceArrowFontSize 12
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #3498db
  ActorBorderColor #3498db
  LifeLineBorderColor #3498db
  ParticipantBorderColor #3498db
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #3498db
  ParticipantFontColor #ffffff
}

actor "developer" as dev
participant "DEV" as dev_branch
participant "TEST" as test_branch
participant "MASTER" as master_branch
participant "HOTFIX" as hotfix_branch

dev -> dev_branch: 1 增量换包到TEST
activate test_branch
test_branch -> master_branch: 2 测试通过后，基于TEST打tag
test_branch -> master_branch: 3 check release分支
test_branch -> master_branch: 4 将release分支合并到MASTER
activate master_branch
master_branch -> hotfix_branch: 5，线上紧急问题，基于MASTER check HOTFIX分支
activate hotfix_branch
hotfix_branch -> hotfix_branch: 6，开发基于HOTFIX分支check本地分支修复问题
hotfix_branch -> hotfix_branch: 7 修复完成后合回HOTFIX分支
hotfix_branch -> master_branch: 8 用CMP工具基于HOTFIX打包换到测试环境进行验证
master_branch -> hotfix_branch: 9 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回MASTER
hotfix_branch -> test_branch: 10 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回TEST
test_branch -> dev_branch: 11 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回DEV
deactivate test_branch
deactivate master_branch
deactivate hotfix_branch

@enduml
